title: Set Board Color for Dashboard
excerpt: I have a dashboard where I have multiple boards being displayed.  I have the colors set to “by board”.  However I do not see where you can change this color.  Also in different parts of the dashboard the board colors cha…

posts.author: seandotson (Sean Dotson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a dashboard where I have multiple boards being displayed. I have the colors set to “by board”. However I do not see where you can change this color. Also in different parts of the dashboard the board colors changes from board to board… see images.

Orange and Red on the Workload widget and blue and red on the Gannt chart widget

ss11082×312 15.2 KB

ss2865×605 50.7 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Sean,

I am afraid at this stage it isn’t possible to customise the colours across widgets. I hear where you’re coming from regarding inconsistent colouring for boards in different widgets and this is certainly feedback that I am sharing with our team internally. Thank you for flagging this

posts.author: seandotson (Sean Dotson)
posts.cookedHtml: Seems like pretty basic functionality. Why have an option to set it “per board” if that is going to be a random color every time?

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
@seandotson This is a very highly requested feature and is listed on Monday’s long term roadmap

Customize chart widget colors Feature requests
I have two charts on my dashboard, one looks at value split up by project type, the other looks at time again split up by project type. I really wish I could adjust the colors because for some reason Monday.com assigns random colors and the SAME PROJECT TYPE will have two different colors. (see screenshot). Level 3 on the top chart is blue but then on the bottom chart level 2 is blue My team likes to look at these two items together and compare the time it takes for a project type vs…

Take a look at the feature request and make sure to vote and share your feedback.
